practice.name: Problem 13 (2000 AMC 8)
practice.statement: In triangle ABC, we have angle ABC = 50° and angle BCA = 60°. If BD bisects angle ABC, then what is the measure of angle ABD?

practice.name: Problem 21 (1999 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Problem involves angle-finding using triangle and angle-chasing techniques with diagram.

practice.name: Problem 9 (2014 AMC 8)
practice.statement: In triangle ABC, AB = AC and D is a point on AC such that BD = BC. What is the degree measure of angle BAC?
